extension.description: A VSCode extension that automatically saves pasted images and inserts comment references
config.saveDirectory.description: Directory name to save images (relative to workspace root)
config.commentTemplate.description: Comment template. Use {path} as placeholder for image path
config.enableDecorations.description: Enable visual decorations for image comments
config.showGutterIcon.description: Show icon in gutter (line number area) for image comments
config.showInlineIcon.description: Show icon inline before image comment text
config.highlightBackground.description: Highlight background of image comment lines
command.pasteImage.title: Paste Image as Comment
command.previewImage.title: Preview Image Comment
message.imageTooLarge: Image is too large ({0}MB). Maximum size is {1}MB.
message.noImageFound: No image found in clipboard. Please copy an image file or take a screenshot first.
